mapper.insert: insert into T_COMP_FACTFUNCCONFIG (C_FACT_CODE, C_RULE_RANGE, C_EXPRESS_TYPE, VC_IMP_FUNC, VC_OUTDETAIL_COLS, VC_OUTGROUP_COLS, VC_OUTSUM_COLS, VC_FACT_COL,VC_DETAIL_COL) values (#{cFactCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cRuleRange,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cExpressType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcImpFunc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcOutdetailCols,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcOutgroupCols,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcOutsumCols,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFactCol,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{vcDetailCol,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select C_FACT_CODE, C_RULE_RANGE, C_EXPRESS_TYPE, VC_IMP_FUNC, VC_OUTDETAIL_COLS, VC_OUTGROUP_COLS, VC_OUTSUM_COLS, VC_FACT_COL, VC_DETAIL_COL from T_COMP_FACTFUNCCONFIG
select a.L_COMBI_ID, a.VC_COMBI_NAME from TRADE.TCOMBI a where a.L_COMBI_ID = #{combiCode}
